1._value: * Type /commands in chat window to see a list of commands.

2._value: * Click the menu on the left side of the chat window, or press the Tab key to change the chat channel.

3._value: * You can configure the chat window to be displayed within or outside of the game screen using either the Settings/Option menu, or the button located on the right side of the chat window.

4._value: * The pop-out chat window function is only supported in windowed mode.

5._value: * You can right-click the chat window tab to set a filter.

6._value: * Use the Speech Bubble button in the Chat window to select who you want to send a whisper to.

7._value: * Use the Link button in the Chat window to chat about your obtained items or earned achievements.

8._value: * Click the chat command in the chat window to open either the chat emoticon UI or the chat shortcut UI.

9._value: * Use Maple Chat to create a chat room, in which you can chat with up to 5 other players.

2._value: : Sends a message to players nearby.

4._value: : Selects a whisper partner. If a character name is specified, sends a whisper to that character.

6._value: : Sends a whisper to a recent partner.

8._value: : Sends a message to your party members.

14._value: : Display a list of your current parties and characters to invite to a party. If entered with a character name, invites that character to the party. (Party leader only.)

16._value: : Kicks the specified party member out of the party. (Party leader only.)

18._value: : Sends a message to your guild.

20._value: : Invites the specified character to your guild. (Guild masters only.)

22._value: : Sends a message to your Alliance.

26._value: : Select a group you'd like to chat with. If a group name is specified, sends a message to online members of that group.

28._value: : Enters Maple Chat. If a character name is specified, they will be invited to the Maple Chat. Up to 5 names can be entered.
